Дорожная карта BEM-931 foundation: 14/14 (100%)

This boundary defines that restoring `.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml` is a separate activation task, not automatic background work.

| Boundary rule | Meaning |
|---|---|
| No automatic activation | Current task must not restore active workflow |
| Explicit activation BEM required | A dedicated BEM must perform the active workflow copy/creation |
| Rollback required | Activation BEM must include rollback if GitHub rejects workflow |
| GitHub acceptance proof required | Activation is not PASS until GitHub Actions accepts workflow |
| No Release PASS | CI activation is not release proof by itself |
